Enjoy the videos and music you love, upl: Geniet van de video's en muziek waar je van houdt, upload originele inhoud, en deel ze allemaal met vrienden, familie en de wereld op YouTube
\n 1. Sign in to [Google Cloud Consol:
1. Log in op [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/).
    2. Maak een nieuw project aan of gebruik een bestaand project.
    3. Ga naar **API's & Services** en klik op **API's & Service inschakelen**.
    4. Zoek naar **YouTube API** in de zoekbalk en schakel het in.
    5. Ga naar het **OAuth toestemming scherm** en selecteer **External** type en klik op maken.
    6. Vul de App Naam, Gebruikers Support E-mail en Ontwikkelaar Contact Informatie in. Klik op Opslaan en doorgaan knop.
    7. Klik op **Voeg toe of verwijder Scopes** en voeg de volgende scopes toe en klik op bijwerken.
       - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube
       - https://www. oogleapis.com/auth/youtube.readonly
       - https://www. oogleapis.com/auth/youtube.upload	
       - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube. orce-ssl
    8. Klik op Opslaan en Doorgaan om de Scopes stap af te maken.
    9. Klik op de knop Gebruikers toevoegen en voeg een test e-mail toe. U kunt uw eigen e-mail toevoegen). hen klik eindelijk op Opslaan en ga verder om de test users portie te voltooien.
    10. Ga naar **Aanmeldingen**. Klik op de knop **Credentials** en selecteer de optie **OAuth client ID**.
    11. Selecteer het applicatie type als **Web Applicatie** en vul het veld Naam in.
    12. Voeg https://cloud.activepieces.com/redirect toe in **Authorized redirect URI's** veld, en klik op de Creëer-knop.
    13. Kopieer **Client ID** en **Client Secret**.
Returns a caption track text by caption: Returns a caption track text by caption ID using the YouTube captions.download endpoint. Requires permission to edit the video, so it only works for captions on videos the authenticated user owns. Auto-generated (asr) caption tracks cannot be downloaded and will return a 403.
Returns caption tracks for a specific Yo: Returns caption tracks for a specific YouTube video using the captions.list endpoint.
Search YouTube videos, channels, and pla: Search YouTube videos, channels, and playlists using the YouTube Data API search.list endpoint.
Returns videos in a YouTube playlist. Yo: Returns videos in a YouTube playlist. You can filter by playlist ID or by specific item IDs.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Maak een aangepaste API call naar een specifiek eindpunt
The caption track ID to download.
Optional output format for the caption t: Optional output format for the caption track.
Optional language code for machine-trans: Optional language code for machine-translated captions (for example: en, es, fr).
Optional. Intended for YouTube CMS conte: Optional. Intended for YouTube CMS content partners acting on behalf of a content owner.
The YouTube video ID to list caption tra: The YouTube video ID to list caption tracks for.
Optional comma-separated caption track I: Optional comma-separated caption track IDs to retrieve (for example: id1,id2).
Search term. Supports operators like OR: Search term. Supports operators like OR (`|`) and NOT (`-`) as supported by YouTube search.
Restrict results to a resource type. Use: Restrict results to a resource type. Use "Any" to search videos, channels, and playlists.
Restrict results to videos owned by the: Restrict results to videos owned by the content owner set in On Behalf Of Content Owner.
Restrict results to videos uploaded via: Restrict results to videos uploaded via your developer project.
Restrict results to videos owned by the: Restrict results to videos owned by the authenticated user.
Required when For Content Owner is enabl: Required when For Content Owner is enabled. Intended for YouTube CMS content partners.
Only return resources from this channel.
Restrict channel searches to a specific: Restrict channel searches to a specific channel type.
Only include resources created at or aft: Only include resources created at or after this datetime (RFC 3339).
Only include resources created before or: Only include resources created before or at this datetime (RFC 3339).
Acceptable values are 0 to 50. Defaults: Acceptable values are 0 to 50. Defaults to 25.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (for exa: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (for example: US, DE, JP).
ISO 639-1 language code (for example: en: ISO 639-1 language code (for example: en, es, ja, zh-Hans).
Curated Freebase topic ID to restrict re: Curated Freebase topic ID to restrict results by topic (for example: /m/04rlf for Music).
Latitude,longitude center point (for exa: Latitude,longitude center point (for example: 37.42307,-122.08427). Requires Location Radius.
Distance from Location with unit (m, km,: Distance from Location with unit (m, km, ft, mi), for example: 5km. Requires Location.
The ID of the playlist whose items you w: The ID of the playlist whose items you want to list. You can find this in the playlist URL — it is the value of the `list` parameter (e.g. `PLbpi6ZahtOH6Ar_3GPy3workLYfGa7mGm`). Either this or Item IDs is required.
A comma-separated list of specific playl: A comma-separated list of specific playlist item IDs to retrieve (e.g. `id1,id2,id3`). Use this instead of Playlist ID if you already know the exact item IDs you want.
Maximum number of items to return. Accep: Maximum number of items to return. Acceptable values are 0–50. Defaults to 50.
Use this to retrieve a specific page of: Use this to retrieve a specific page of results. The previous response includes a `nextPageToken` value — paste it here to get the next page.
Only return playlist items that contain: Only return playlist items that contain this video. Leave blank to return all items. The video ID is the `v` parameter in a YouTube URL (e.g. `dQw4w9WgXcQ`).
Authorization headers are injected autom: Autorisatie headers worden automatisch geïnjecteerd vanuit uw verbinding.
Inschakelen voor bestanden zoals PDF's, afbeeldingen etc.
